title: Munchy Jamaican Penne Skillet
description: Funky, crunchy, energizing Jamaican dish featuring penne rigate, yakimono grilling, and a crispy chickpea topping.
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C to roast chickpeas.
Coat chickpeas with 1 tbsp olive oil, salt, and pepper, then spread on a baking sheet and roast for 15 minutes until crisp.
Heat a cast-iron skillet over medium heat and add the remaining 1 tbsp oil.
Add sliced bell pepper and red onion, sauté for 3 minutes until softened.
Stir in minced garlic and scotch bonnet pepper, cooking for an additional minute.
Pour in coconut milk and tomato puree, then add fresh thyme, allspice, and salt; simmer for 5 minutes.
Add uncooked penne rigate and stir to coat with sauce, cooking until pasta is al dente, about 10 minutes.
Sprinkle roasted chickpeas over the skillet and serve hot, garnishing with extra thyme if desired.
